name: smarzban-skills
description: A personal collection of reusable agent skills, packaged as installable plugins.

plugins.name: agent-sdlc
plugins.description: Full-SDLC pipeline for AI coding agents: idea -> acceptance criteria -> architecture -> techstack -> atomic task plan -> readiness gate -> test-first subagent-driven build -> reviewed PR, plus skills for writing the project README and full repository documentation.

plugins.name: review-gate
plugins.description: Multi-model code-review gate + whole-repo audit (two skills: review-gate, repo-audit). An agent orchestrates holistic reviews across diverse models; a deterministic spine owns the block/pass verdict and the trust boundary, so a steered or prompt-injected reviewer can't flip the gate. Claude Code only (ships a Node CLI). Unversioned: tracks the default branch (git-SHA versioning), so every pushed commit is a release.
